title: Project Report: SaaS Subscription Platform — Full Stack Web Developer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Multi-tenant SaaS with Stripe billing, team invites, admin panel, and observability.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Advanced)*

**SaaS Subscription Platform** is a advanced-level end-to-end project for Full Stack Web Developer. Duration: 6–8 weeks. Multi-tenant SaaS with Stripe billing, team invites, admin panel, and observability. Tools: React, Node.js, Stripe, PostgreSQL.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Stripe subscription checkout
Objective: Multi-tenant data isolation
Objective: Team invite flow
Objective: Admin analytics panel
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Full Stack Web Developer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Full Stack Web Developer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Full Stack Web Developer resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: Billing
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Billing** *(Level: Advanced)*

Stripe integration. Complete these tasks: Checkout session; Webhooks. Deliverable for this phase: Test subscription flow.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] Checkout session
- [ ] Webhooks
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase Billing is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### When to use it
During week 1 of the project timeline.

### Where to use it
Full Stack Web Developer agile sprints and coursework milestones.

### Real use example
Team demo shows the Test subscription flow to the teacher.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Advanced)*

Submit all final deliverables: Live SaaS app; Stripe test receipts; Ops runbook; Architecture diagram. Skills demonstrated: SaaS, Billing, Multi-tenant. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Live SaaS app
Deliverable: Stripe test receipts
Deliverable: Ops runbook
Deliverable: Architecture diagram
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Live SaaS app and passes the rubric.
key_takeaways: Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.
